goal_text:
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'south' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the south and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the type of hotel
Make sure you get star of the hotel and whether they have free parking
